positive: A complex, stylized mandalic illustration featuring intertwined geometric patterns and botanical elements. The design should center around a stylized crescent moon and branching foliage, rendered in a vintage etching style with strong, clean black linework. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of muted sage green, deep indigo blue, and cream accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical, suitable for a circular print placement on apparel. Focus on clear silhouettes, high contrast, and elegant, flowing organic shapes juxtaposed with sharp, precise geometry. Clean line art, intricate details, decorative pattern, bohemian aesthetic, Zentangle influence.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands, jpeg artifacts, low quality, cartoon, graffiti, logos, trademarks
